invariants.name: no_unauthorized_payout
invariants.description: Contract should not allow payouts without proper authorization

invariants.name: no_unauthorized_state_mutation
invariants.description: Critical state should not be mutable without authorization

invariants.name: pool_balance_integrity
invariants.description: Risk pool total balance should equal sum of individual contributions

invariants.name: policy_fund_locking
invariants.description: Policy funds should be locked until claim approval or expiry

invariants.name: claim_uniqueness
invariants.description: Each claim should be unique and prevent double payouts

invariants.name: governance_quorum
invariants.description: Governance proposals should require proper quorum

invariants.name: slashing_proportionality
invariants.description: Slashing should be proportional to violation severity

security_properties.description: All critical functions must have proper access controls
Functions should be protected against reentrancy attacks
Arithmetic operations should check for overflow/underflow
All external inputs should be validated
